% check a.php
a.php:17:42: class const Catalog\Item::NONEXISTENT does not exist
a.php:20:22: class const Catalog\Item::ALSO_MISSING does not exist

-- a.php --
<?php

namespace Catalog;

class Item
{
	/** @var string */
	const STATUS_ACTIVE = 'active';
}

class ItemService
{
	function register(string $name, string $label, $options): void;
}

$svc = new ItemService;
$svc->register('status', 'Status', Item::NONEXISTENT);

// Also detect missing const when it's the first argument.
$svc->register(Item::ALSO_MISSING, 'Label', 'opts');
